name: Kevin McCloud's Escape to the Wild
original_name: Kevin McCloud's Escape to the Wild
overview: With cities becoming more crowded, and our lives very stressful, Kevin McCloud attempts to discover whether a simpler life out in the wild could make us happier. He travels to different remote destination to see how others have built their lives and dwellings against the odds.

trailers.title: Kevin McCloud's Escape to the Wild | Monday 9pm | Channel 4
